name: Chicken Cordon Bleu II
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Pound chicken breasts to approximately 1/4 inch thickness (without tearing), top with 1 slice ham, and 1/3 cup Swiss cheese. Roll up carefully, tucking in ends as you roll.
3. In a small bowl, combine egg, cooking oil, and water. Roll each chicken piece first in flour, then in the egg mixture, and finally in bread crumbs.
4. Place the rolled chicken pieces in a pan and bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes.
5. While baking the chicken, prepare the sauce by combining crushed pineapple, brown sugar, and lemon juice in a separate bowl. Cook on medium heat until bubbly; then turn down the heat to simmer.
6. Gradually add cornstarch with water until slightly thickened.
7. Add sherry and butter to the sauce mixture. Serve hot over the cooked chicken.
